Findings.title: API ConsoleLogin was invoked from an IP address on a known Tor exit node list.
Findings.description: An API was used to access the AWS Management Console from IP address 185.220.101.34, which is on a list of known Tor exit node IP addresses. Tor exit node connections are frequently associated with malicious actors hiding their identity.

Findings.title: Credentials for instance role on i-0dev567890 were used from external IP address 104.28.55.201.
Findings.description: Credentials that were created exclusively for an EC2 instance through an instance launch role were used from an external IP address. This indicates that the credentials may have been exfiltrated from the instance.

Findings.title: An anomalous number of S3 API calls were made by assumed-role/CloudVaultAdminRole/dev-contractor-01-session.
Findings.description: An IAM entity invoked S3 APIs in a manner that differs from the established baseline. An unusual number of S3 GetObject API calls were invoked by this IAM entity on S3 bucket cloudvault-client-docs.

Findings.title: An unprotected port on EC2 instance i-0dev567890 is being probed.
Findings.description: EC2 instance i-0dev567890 has an unprotected port 22 which is being probed by a known malicious host with IP address 45.33.32.156.

Findings.title: An unprotected port on EC2 instance i-0dev567890 is being probed.
Findings.description: EC2 instance i-0dev567890 has an unprotected port 3389 which is being probed by a known malicious host with IP address 91.240.118.44.

Findings.title: An API was used to access the AWS Management Console without MFA by IAM user james.park.
Findings.description: An API was used to access the AWS Management Console without multi-factor authentication by IAM principal james.park from IP address 98.45.172.92.

Findings.title: API CreateAccessKey was invoked using root credentials from IP address 185.220.101.34.
Findings.description: API CreateAccessKey was invoked using root credentials from IP address 185.220.101.34. Root credentials should not be used for day-to-day API access.

Findings.title: APIs commonly associated with discovery of permissions and policies of an IAM entity were invoked by IAM user dev-contractor-01.
Findings.description: APIs commonly used to discover the permissions and policies associated with an IAM entity were invoked by IAM principal dev-contractor-01. Such activity is not typically seen from this principal.

Findings.title: An anomalous API call by IAM user dev-contractor-01 to assume a role was observed.
Findings.description: An anomalous API call (AssumeRole) was observed for IAM principal dev-contractor-01. This API is not commonly used by this principal and the invoked role (CloudVaultAdminRole) has administrative-level access.

Findings.title: EC2 instance i-0dev567890 is being targeted by SSH brute force attacks.
Findings.description: EC2 instance i-0dev567890 has been involved in SSH brute force attacks 247 times. Brute force attacks are used to gain unauthorized access to your instance by guessing the SSH password.

Findings.title: EC2 instance i-0dev567890 is querying a domain name that is associated with Bitcoin-related activity.
Findings.description: EC2 instance i-0dev567890 is querying a domain name that is associated with Bitcoin or other cryptocurrency-related activity.

Findings.title: EC2 instance i-0dev567890 is performing DNS data exfiltration through DNS queries.
Findings.description: EC2 instance i-0dev567890 is performing outbound DNS queries that indicate DNS data exfiltration. The DNS queries contain encoded data in the subdomain portion of the query.

Findings.title: Public access was granted to S3 bucket cloudvault-app-assets.
Findings.description: An IAM entity invoked an API used to grant public access to an S3 bucket, cloudvault-app-assets, by changing the bucket policy or ACL. The API PutBucketPolicy was invoked by IAM principal priya.sharma.

Findings.title: An unprotected port on EC2 instance i-0dev567890 is being probed.
Findings.description: EC2 instance i-0dev567890 has an unprotected port 22 which is being probed by a known malicious host with IP address 103.45.67.89.

Findings.title: An unusual console login was observed for IAM user intern-2026.
Findings.description: A console login was observed for IAM principal intern-2026 from IP address 98.45.172.101. This principal had 2 failed authentication attempts before a successful login.

Findings.title: S3 account level block public access settings were disabled for account 471923845612.
Findings.description: S3 account level block public access settings (BlockPublicAcls, RestrictPublicBuckets) were disabled for account 471923845612, allowing individual bucket policies or ACLs to grant public access.

Findings.title: EC2 instance i-0web111111 is performing outbound port scans against remote hosts.
Findings.description: EC2 instance i-0web111111 is being used to perform outbound port scans against remote hosts on ports 80, 443, 8080, 8443.
